docs.title: Phoenix Tuner X not showing SystemCore CAN busses
docs.text: Phoenix Tuner X does not show devices on a bus unless the bus is used in code.

docs.title: AdvantageScope web server not running
docs.text: The AdvantageScope web server never runs, after AScope Lite is installed.

docs.title: Xbox Controller Right X axis always 0.0
docs.text:
CommandGamepad works as expected.

private final CommandGamepad joystick = new CommandGamepad(0);

CommandNiDsXboxController's right X axis always returns 0.

private final CommandNiDsXboxController joystick = new CommandNiDsXboxController(0);

docs.title: Logitech C920 not working in CameraServer
docs.text: CameraServer never sends any data from a Logitech C920 webcam. A Logitech C270 works fine.

docs.title: Log Output
docs.text:
CS: USB Camera 0: Connected to USB camera on /dev/video0
CS: USB Camera 0: set format 1 res 160x120
CS: USB Camera 0: set FPS to 30
CS: ERROR: ioctl VIDIOC_DQBUF failed at UsbCameraImpl.cpp:534: Invalid argument (UsbUtil.cpp:157)
CS: WARNING: USB Camera 0: could not dequeue buffer (UsbCameraImpl.cpp:535)
CS: USB Camera 0: Attempting to connect to USB camera on /dev/video0
CS: USB Camera 0: Connected to USB camera on /dev/video0
CS: USB Camera 0: set format 1 res 160x120
CS: USB Camera 0: set FPS to 30

docs.title: Progress
docs.text:
What weve accomplished so far: Tested different hardwarre configurations Rev PDH +Systemcore+ Canivore

Rev PDP +systemcore+kraken

  • Tested commands v2 with motor
  • Tested commands v3 with motor
  • Tested Limelight v3 ()
  • Tested USB camera

Initial Testing: used PDH+12V battery+Systemcore Added CTRE API Added Canivore appications to web configuration for systemcore Utilized commands v2 +a motor and got basic functionality out of the motor using the xbox controller (no closed loop control) Sent data for a CANCoder and Pigeon2 through network tables and displayed on elastic

Set up CTRE PDP+Systemcore+Kraken with and without a canivore Commanded a motor with the commands v3 structure Attached a webcam to the setup in an attempt to display video(not functional witht eh model of camera, logitech C920)

tested the limelight 3 with the systemcore+CTRTE PDP+12V battery+Krakenx60 Functional and has preview in teh web UI

docs.title: Issues
docs.text: • PathplannerLib does not have support for Commands V3
